issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases for configuration and usage.
Only a single usage example is provided, lacking multiple realistic demonstrations.
The skill is specific to Continue and does not work with any AI agent, making it vendor-locked.

scenarios.name: add-claude-model
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides the required JSON snippet with correct fields and placeholder, while Response B uses YAML and incorrect field names, failing the rubric.

scenarios.name: add-prisma-migration-command
scenarios.rationale: Response B provides the required .continue/config.json snippet with correct fields and prompt, while Response A offers a script instead of the config entry.
